creator: bruno@ruomad.net
text:
Created attachment 248319
patch against current ports tree

The previous patch did build on FreeBSD 14.0 but the OCSP responder was segfaulting.

This fixes the previous incorrect patch through backporting changes from upstream.

OCSP responder (openca-ocspd) now works on FreeBSD 14.0.

Attached a git formatted patch against current ports tree.
